title: Fabricate and install automotive and marine floor coverings
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Fabricate and install automotive and marine floor coverings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for fabrication of floor coverings

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Fabrication methods and materials are selected and inspected for quality and quantities are calculated1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Fabrication methods and materials are selected and inspected for quality and quantities are calculated1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Fabrication methods and materials are selected and inspected for quality and quantities are calculated1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for fabrication of floor coverings

elements.title: Measure, fabricate and install floor coverings

pcs.text: Work area is prepared and fabrication tools and equipment are set up for job requirement2.2 Materials are measured, marked out and cut according to floor covering specifications and patterns, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Floor coverings are fabricated and fabrication process is monitored to ensure specifications, customer requirements, and workplace procedures are met2.4 Defects, quality issues and non-conformances are reported to authorised personnel according to workplace procedures2.5 Installation and fitting of floor coverings, insulation and fastenings are completed according to workplace procedures and job requirements

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Measure, fabricate and install floor coverings

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
